copyright_text.name: copyright_text
copyright_text.default: '© 2026 Belu Malu · Art by Belu Maluenda'

footer_text.name: footer_text
footer_text.default: 'Made and shared for the joy of it. Thank you for supporting the dream.'

hero_headline.name: hero_headline
hero_headline.default:
'Art rooted in
movement, memory,
and joy.'

hero_subtext.name: hero_subtext
hero_subtext.default: 'I''m Belu, a Chilean artist based in the U.S. I create playful, meaningful artwork inspired by memory, travel, heritage, and the wild beauty of everyday life.'

featured_description.name: featured_description
featured_description.default: 'A spinning bloom of colour built from one cat, endless patience, and a little obsession with symmetry.'

statement_quote.name: statement_quote
statement_quote.default: 'Born in Santiago and raised in the U.S., I''ve always had one foot in each world. My art is where they finally meet.'

shop_heading.name: shop_heading
shop_heading.default: 'A new collection is on the way.'

shop_body.name: shop_body
shop_body.default: 'Support the dream, take something home from an ever-evolving collection. I''m deep in a new body of work right now, so the racks are quiet for a moment. Join the list for first access.'

intro.name: intro
intro.default: 'Born in Santiago, Chile but raised in the U.S., I always felt like I had one foot in either country, and that there was always a part of my identity I couldn''t fully express.'

pull_quote.name: pull_quote
pull_quote.default: 'Who I am is not rooted in where I come from, but in the things I love to do.'

studio_text.name: studio_text
studio_text.default: 'Most days you''ll find me with a brush in one hand and a coffee in the other, chasing colour and trying to make something that feels alive. Everything here is made by me, in small batches, for the love of it.'

lead_text.name: lead_text
lead_text.default: 'For commission inquiries, originals, stockist or wholesale questions, or just to say hi, I''d love to hear from you. I read every message myself.'

in_person_text.name: in_person_text
in_person_text.default: 'In person, find Belu Malu tees, prints, and stickers at every Abstract Denver location.'

heading.name: heading
heading.default: 'A new collection is on the way.'

body_text.name: body_text
body_text.default: 'Hey there, thanks for stopping by my lil'' shop. I''m deep in a new body of work right now, so the racks are quiet for a moment. Join the list for first access, or reach out if you''re looking for an original, commission, or retired favourite.'

signature.name: signature
signature.default: 'Thank you for the support. love, Belu'
